lanes.name: continue-self-build
lanes.prompt: Continue using Vibe's own primitives (autonomous-session in .vibe, handoff/checkpoint/resume CLI, self-plan) to finish any remaining integration/polish for the declarative agent OS (dashboard usability, full pnpm run check, Go/TS parity, self-use examples). Follow the full loop and keep PROGRESS.md current via the checkpoint tool.

autonomous.checkpointEvery: after every major self-invocation (handoff, verify, checkpoint)
